input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.8.2
            TITLE: two tsmps must be installed in the charger ev.8.2 which are:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.8.2: Two TSMPs must be installed in the Charger EV.8.2 which are:
EV.5.8.2 Two TSMPs must be installed in the Charger EV.8.2 which are: 
a. Connected to the positive and negative Charger output lines  
b. Available during charging of any Accumulator(s)

final_answer: Two TSMPs must be installed in the Charger EV.8.2 which are: a. Connected to the positive and negative Charger output lines b. Available during charging of any Accumulator(s)
